title: Pray: The Story of Patrick Peyton
original_title: Pray: The Story of Patrick Peyton
overview: The inspiring true story of a poor Irish immigrant who sets sail for America in 1928 with dreams of becoming a millionaire but, with the help of the most iconic celebrities of Hollywood, ends up spending his life championing the message, "The Family That Prays Together Stays Together."
